description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a manicured lawn and a row of palm trees lining one side. The structure features a flat roof, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a spacious wraparound porch elevated by steps. The rear of the bungalow opens to a backyard with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and a paved walkway. Two cars are parked on a driveway adjacent to the house, indicating a residential setting. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, likely wood or composite siding, with white trim and railings. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a strong connection to the outdoors.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, wraparound porch, and backyard pool, set on a landscaped lot with palm trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wraparound porch, and a row of palm trees behind the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway with two parked cars, the backyard pool, and sun loungers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the pool, sun loungers, and extensive windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the porch steps, pool, and a large expanse of lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows along the front and rear facades
